label: Heat
title: Crime should pull real pressure.
description: The best criminal stories come from response windows, police attention, and the risk that one rushed decision can collapse the whole job.

label: Crew
title: Bigger scores need trusted people.
description: Whether the job is quiet prep or a loud heist, the strongest underworld RP comes from crews with roles, habits, loyalties, and tension.

label: Escalation
title: Small jobs should lead somewhere bigger.
description: Street income, robbery, fraud, and heists should all connect so characters can build a criminal reputation instead of repeating one isolated scene forever.
